values.fullName: Customer - In Contract With Another Provider
Use Case - All Tuition Paid Offline By Agencies %28No Co-Pay%29
Use Case - Billing Done By Larger Org %28e%2Eg%2E%2C YMCA%2C Church%29
Electronic Version of Information Does Not Exist
Need to Export From Other System
Have Some%2C Need to Purchase More
1%3A Ineligible%3A does not run their own payroll
2%3A Not interested in using brightwheel%E2%80%99s payroll solution
3%3A Reactively interested%3A wanted to learn more after learning brightwheel%E2%80%99s capabilities and partnership
4%3A Proactively interested%3A came to brightwheel for payroll or planning to switch payroll providers in the next few months
Parents Should NOT See Subsidy Charges
